name: French Onion Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice onions 1/8 inch thick.
2. Melt butter in a large pot.
3. Add onions to the melted butter and cook slowly for 1 hour and 30 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Add beef stock and bring to a simmer. Cook for an additional 2 hours, or until onions are tender.
5. Season with salt to taste (optional).
6. Optionally, color the soup using Kitchen Bouquet.
7. Refrigerate overnight if desired.
8. Reheat the soup before serving.
9. Serve with croutons and Swiss cheese on top.
